title: Mace Gauntlet
description: Replaces the Mace with a gauntlet.
body:
This texture pack **does not require any mods**, and should normally work in **every version** the mace is in (even tho it will say its outdated).

This was made for fun and mainly because i hated the mace texture and decided to make my own, i felt a gauntlet was a perfect fit since its also a heavy blunt weapon.

You can use this in a modpack if u want to.
